category_sources: Official homepage/manpage says hexedit shows a file in ASCII and hexadecimal and supports modifying/searching.
source_facts.description says it views and edits files in hexadecimal or ASCII.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is "HEXEDIT" and command name is hexedit.
docs_sources: Official page contains NAME, SYNOPSIS, DESCRIPTION, options, and command reference.
source_facts.homepage is the official hexedit documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pixel/hexedit; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage documents ASCII/hex display, file modification, searching, undo, save, and navigation commands.
source_facts.description identifies hexadecimal/ASCII file viewing and editing.
